controls.title: Sunset exact Feather, Sunset, and Sunrise cardinality
controls.objective: Every completed full Atlas Sunset creates exactly one new sealed Feather, exactly one immutable Sunset bound to it, and exactly one Sunrise bound to the same pair.
controls.applies_when: The semantic objective is a full Atlas Sunset or a closeout that claims Sunset completion.
required_evidence: Exact candidate inventory proves one Feather, one Sunset, and one Sunrise.
Schema and relationship validation prove the same Feather/Sunset pair across all three records.

controls.title: Lessons never self-promote
controls.objective: Observations and Golden Wing candidates gain no authority until human-controlled review absorbs the lesson into a real enforced control.
controls.applies_when: A Preview, Build, review, Sunset, or continuity action identifies, evaluates, records, or reuses a lesson.
required_evidence: The lesson remains observation evidence or a Golden Wing candidate before reviewed absorption.
Any claimed absorption names an ACTIVE assurance control and its enforcing source and test.
